data.title: HaLLu: Deep cooperation reached with 4 strategic partners
data.description: HaLLu announced that it has reached in-depth cooperation agreements with four strategic partners. The four parties will conduct comprehensive collaboration on ecosystem building, liquidity support, technology refinement, and community operation to accelerate the project. In addition, HaLLu stated that IDO has entered the final sprint stage; the new bylaws and roadmap for the next stage will also be announced soon.

data.title: UK Lawmakers Urge Revisions to Bank of England's Stablecoin Framework
data.description:
According to PANews, a coalition of UK cross-party lawmakers has addressed a letter to Chancellor Rachel Reeves, urging modifications to the Bank of England's proposed stablecoin framework. The lawmakers expressed concerns that the current draft could stifle innovation and lead to capital flight. They highlighted that the framework's restrictions on the use of stablecoins in wholesale markets, the prohibition of interest on reserves, and a holding cap of £20,000 might diminish London's appeal as a global financial hub, potentially driving investors towards dollar-pegged alternatives.

The letter advocates for the establishment of a forward-looking stablecoin framework to ensure international investment, support the growth of high-value fintech, and reinforce the UK's position as a global innovation center.

data.title: 47 Ronin director blows budget on crypto, accused of wire fraud
data.description:
Carl Erik Rinsch, the popular director of the Hollywood blockbuster 47 Ronin, has been convicted of wire fraud and money laundering.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/47-ronin-director-crypto-accused-wire-fraud/

data.title: Grayscale transferred approximately 14,684 ETH and 252 BTC to Coinbase Prime, worth over $70 million.
data.description: According to data monitored by Arkham, digital asset management company Grayscale once again saw large-scale ETH and BTC transfers last night, transferring approximately 14,684.643 ETH (worth approximately $47 million) and approximately 252.5 BTC (worth approximately $23.28 million) to a Coinbase Prime address.

data.title: Solana Mobile: Partnering with chip manufacturers, plans to integrate hardware kits into over 2 billion Android phones.
data.description: Solana officially announced on the X platform that Solana Mobile is working with chip manufacturers to bring hardware integration kits to over 2 billion Android phones.

data.title: OCC Clears Circle, Ripple and Others to Launch Crypto National Banks
data.description:
The OCC has conditionally approved five crypto firms, including Circle and Ripple, to launch national trust banks.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/occ-clears-circle-ripple-and-others-to-launch-crypto-national-banks/

data.title: Tether Moves to Acquire Majority Stake in Juventus Football Club
data.description:
Tether has submitted an all-cash offer to acquire a 65. 4% stake in Juventus and plans to invest up to €1 billion in the club’s long-term development.
source: https://btcusa.com/tether-moves-to-acquire-majority-stake-in-juventus-football-club/
